mapper.select: SELECT * FROM study_list WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND material_id = #{materialId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM study_list WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY update_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO study_list (user_id, material_id, progress, note, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{materialId}, #{progress}, #{note}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
